use_cases: Trigger form submission in checkout or registration flows
Execute primary actions like save, confirm, or purchase
Provide destructive action buttons for cancel or delete operations
Serve as secondary or alternative action options within forms
Enable navigation or link-like behavior with ghost and link variants
ai_summary: A versatile, accessible button component with multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility and class-variance-authority for consistent styling. Features standard focus states, disabled states, and shadow effects suitable for checkout forms, SaaS interfaces, and general web applications requiring interactive action elements.
